subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for reaching out — we’d be glad to explore this.

A short introductory call next week works on our side. If you send over a few windows that suit you, I’ll line something up.

I can’t share internal contact directories or direct phone lines for our CTO/VP of Engineering, but if there are specific topics you’d like to discuss, I can help route them to the right person once we’ve set up the initial call.

Best,
Agent
